prompt:
Update your expertise files to reflect Phase 7 (Polish & Hardening) changes. Phase 7 is now complete. Here's what changed:

## Task 2: Error Message Polish
- Updated all error messages in tracker.ts to wrap IDs in backticks (e.g., `abc123`)
- Fixed hierarchy.ts messages: added period, wrapped IDs in backticks
- Updated corresponding test assertions in hierarchy.test.ts, tracker.test.ts, tracker-hierarchy.test.ts

## Task 1: JSDoc Comments
- Added comprehensive JSDoc to all public exports:
  - src/core/tracker.ts — Tracker class + all 17 methods with @param, @returns, @throws, @example
  - src/types/issue.ts — 6 types
  - src/types/event.ts — 9 event types + union
  - src/types/index-file.ts — 2 types
  - src/types/dependency.ts — 3 types
  - src/types/user.ts — 3 types
  - src/types/config.ts — 1 interface
  - src/types/api.ts — All request/response types
  - src/core/errors.ts — TrackgenticError class + ErrorCodes
  - src/core/auth.ts — resolveAuthor function

## Task 3: Edge Case Testing
- Created tests/integration/edge-cases.test.ts with 18 new tests:
  - 6 empty tracker operation tests
  - 4 invalid JSON corruption tests
  - 3 missing file during operations tests
  - 3 large event volume tests (100+ updates, performance, 50+ comments)
  - 2 self-referencing/no-op tests
- No production code changes

## Task 4: Package Configuration
- Added prepublishOnly script to package.json: 'bun run quality'
- Created tests/integration/package.test.ts with 3 tests (package.json fields, CLI --help, CLI --version)
- runner.ts already exports createProgram() which is used by the package tests

## Final Stats
- 549 tests, 1948 assertions
- All quality gates pass (typecheck, lint, format, docs)
- Phase 7 complete — all implementation phases done
